settings.title: Our Story
settings.description: Established in 2020 by Paolo and Dane Wong, W Bakehouse has evolved from a micro-bakery serving a small batch of Sourdough loaves, to now serving a wider market of retail and business customers in Manila and in North Luzon.  Our curated, artisanal baked goods are available to both individual and business customers. For B2B partnerships, we are offering food concept solutions for cafes, restaurants, special engagements and retail events.  W Bakehouse continues to grow and expand its reach by catering to more customers, with the goal of producing naturally-fermented sourdough breads and confectionery nationwide

settings.title: BAKING WITH A MISSION
settings.text: Our goal has always been to create positive experiences out of our baked goods and creations. We specialize in producing naturally-leavened, slow-fermented breads and pastries, made the traditional way.

settings.title: What are your baking schedules?
settings.content: We bake Tuesdays, Thursdays and Saturdays of the week. Since our slow-fermentation process takes about 15 hours, our order cut off is 2-days prior to your preferred bake date. All breads are baked the same day as your delivery date.

settings.title: When is the best time to slice my  sourdough loaves?
settings.content: The best time to slice is at the end of the day, when the bread has properly cooled down.

settings.title: What are your fulfillment options?
settings.content: You may book for your own pick-up, or choose to have your orders delivered. Our delivery fees are based per area or location. All orders will be coming from our Mandaluyong commissary.

settings.title: What are your guidelines to freshness?
settings.content:
Sourdough Loaves and Brioche
Our naturally-leavened breads can sit 2 days at best in room temperature. If you wish to store for while, we recommend for it to be sliced before storing in the freezer and keep for up to 2 to 3 weeks.

Sourdough Cookies, Waffles and Pastries
Cookies, Waffles and Pastries can sit in room temperature for 2 to 3 days. Store in the fridge to keep it for at least a week, or in the freezer to keep it for up to 2 weeks.

Focizzas and Focaccias
Consume immediately upon receipt.
Store in the fridge to keep it for 2 to 3 days, or in the freezer to keep it up for up to 2 weeks

settings.title: What are your delivery locations?
settings.content: For now we are able to serve Metro Manila, and nearby provinces and cities (in the south. or north of Luzon).

settings.title: Storage information
settings.content:
• Sourdough bread and pastries generally keep for about 3 days in a dry and cool room temp environment
  • May keep a bit longer in a plastic bag in the fridge for short term storage
  • May keep for a month or so in the freezer. Pre-slice before freezing to easily access serving size pieces.

settings.title: Reheating Instructions
settings.content:
• Room Temp / Frozen Bread - Heat in Oven Toaster or on a Thick pan (with butter) over medium heat for about 2 to 3 mins.
  • Room Temp / Frozen Pastries - Heat in Oven Toaster over low to medium heat for 2 - 3 mins
  • May need to extend a 1 - 2 minutes for frozen bread and pastries
  • For older bread - Spray with water, toaster or pan side down and let the crumb rehydrate during the heating process

settings.title:
It pains me physically to see woman victimized,
rendered pathetic by fashion.

Awkwardness gives me great comfort. I’ve never been cool, but I’ve felt cool. I’ve been in the
cool place, but I wasn’t really cool – I was trying to pass for hip or cool.
settings.text: A girl should be two things: classy and fabulous. I am convinced that there can be luxury in simplicity. I wanted to dress the woman who lives and works, not the woman in a painting. It’s hard to balance everything. It’s always challenging. My relationships with producers or photographers – these are relationships that took years. I can’t get sucked into that celebrity thing, because I think it’s just crass. My aim is to make the poor look rich and the rich look poor. Vanity is the healthiest thing in life. I believe that my clothes can give people a better image of themselves – that it can increase their feelings of confidence and happiness. You can hide so much behind theatrics, and I don’t need to do that any more. I don’t really know how to do casual clothes.

difference in the fight against climate change.
